title: senecio yunguyensis
intro: Senecio yunguyensis, also known as Yungay groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Senecio. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Its health benefits include being used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Senecio yunguyensis can be consumed as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture to treat various ailments.
